name: d_wk_bk
description: Chebyshev distance between the White King and Black King.

name: d_wk_p
description: Chebyshev distance between the White King and the Pawn.

name: d_bk_p
description: Chebyshev distance between the Black King and the Pawn.

name: m_wk_bk
description: Manhattan distance between the two kings.

name: m_wk_p
description: Manhattan distance between the White King and the Pawn.

name: m_bk_p
description: Manhattan distance between the Black King and the Pawn.

name: e2_wk_bk
description: Squared Euclidean distance between the two kings.

name: e2_wk_p
description: Squared Euclidean distance between the White King and the Pawn.

name: e2_bk_p
description: Squared Euclidean distance between the Black King and the Pawn.

name: pawn_rank
description: Rank of the pawn from White’s perspective (0–7).

name: pawn_rank_norm
description: Normalized pawn rank in the interval [0, 1].

name: pawn_file
description: File index of the pawn (0–7).

name: d_promo
description: Remaining rank distance until pawn promotion.

name: wk_bk_dr
description: Signed rank offset between White King and Black King.

name: wk_bk_df
description: Signed file offset between White King and Black King.

name: wk_p_dr
description: Signed rank offset between White King and the Pawn.

name: wk_p_df
description: Signed file offset between White King and the Pawn.

name: bk_p_dr
description: Signed rank offset between Black King and the Pawn.

name: bk_p_df
description: Signed file offset between Black King and the Pawn.

name: rank_gap
description: Absolute vertical separation between kings.

name: file_gap
description: Absolute horizontal separation between kings.

name: wk_edge
description: Minimum distance from the White King to the board edge.

name: bk_edge
description: Minimum distance from the Black King to the board edge.

name: p_edge
description: Minimum distance from the pawn to the board edge.

name: wk_mobility
description: Number of geometrically available adjacent squares for the White King.

name: bk_mobility
description: Number of geometrically available adjacent squares for the Black King.

name: wk_vs_p_rank
description: Signed rank ordering of the White King relative to the Pawn.

name: bk_vs_p_rank
description: Signed rank ordering of the Black King relative to the Pawn.

name: triangle_area2
description: Twice the area of the triangle formed by the two kings and the pawn.

name: turn
description: Side-to-move indicator.

name: d_wr_bk
description: Chebyshev distance between the White Rook and Black King.

name: d_wq_bk
description: Chebyshev distance between the White Queen and Black King.

name: d_wk_wr
description: Chebyshev distance between the White King and White Rook.

name: rook_cut_rank
description: Whether the rook cuts off the Black King along the rank.

name: rook_cut_file
description: Whether the rook cuts off the Black King along the file.

name: box_rank_gap
description: Rank separation defining one dimension of the confinement box.

name: box_file_gap
description: File separation defining one dimension of the confinement box.

name: box_area
description: Area of the rook–king confinement rectangle.

name: bk_on_edge
description: Whether the Black King is on the board edge.

name: bk_in_corner
formula: dist_to_edge(bk) == 0 AND file(bk) in {0,7} AND rank(bk) in {0,7}
description: Whether the Black King is in a corner square.

name: rook_protected
description: Whether the rook is protected by the White King.

name: bk_corner_distance
description: Chebyshev distance from Black King to nearest corner.
